description: This Dart source file defines the AppDatabase class, which manages local database operations for a storytelling app. It includes schema creation, initial data seeding with sample tales, and database access methods.

classes.name: AppDatabase
classes.description: A class responsible for initializing, creating schema, seeding, and providing access to the SQLite database containing tales and listens data.

methods.name: init
methods.description: Initializes the database if it hasn't been initialized yet, setting up schema and seed data.

methods.name: _createSchema
methods.description: Creates the 'tales' and 'listens' tables in the database.

methods.name: _seed
methods.description: Inserts initial sample data into the 'tales' table to make the app immediately usable.
